SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-21-2022 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO AMEND CLAIM TO NOV-30-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF ANDREA CLEMMONS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DANIEL JONES IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CLEMMONS, ANDREA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JONES, DANIEL HAMILTON $1,320.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,320.00, THE COURT SPOKE TO DANIEL CHEUNG. BASED ON THE EVIDENCE IN COURT AND CONVERSATION WITH MR. CHEUNG - THE $1350.00 SECURITY DEPOSIT PLAINTIFF PAID DEFENDANT WAS NOT RECOVERED BY MR. CHEUNG. calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
Off Calendar Jan-18-2023 Set For Trial On Jan-18-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 502

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jan-18-2023 Continued To Jan-18-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jan-18-2023 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff/Respondent Andrea Clemmons appeared.
Defendant/Appellant Daniel Hamilton Jones appeared.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo.

Ms. Clemmons requests a continuance due to a death in the family. Dept. 502 notified Dept. 206 of the request via email but commenced trial before receiving a reply from Dept. 206.

Plaintiff/Respondent Andrea Clemmons sworn and testified on her own behalf.
Defendant/Appellant Daniel Hamilton Jones sworn and testified on his own behalf.
Witness Donald Cheung sworn and testified on behalf of Defendant/Appellant Daniel Hamilton Jones.

The following documentary evidence is introduced and admitted:
Plaintiff/Respondent's Group Exhibit.
Defendant/Appellant's Group Exhibit.
Appellant's and Respondent's exhibits are retained.

The matter is taken under submission.
Judge: Jeffrey S. Ross; Clerk: J. Bertelsen; Not reported. (502)

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
